title: Will we see a new version of Cruel Angels Thesis
display_title: Will we see a new version of Cruel Angels Thesis
wikitext:
[]: Will we see a new version of Cruel Angel's Thesis?             Quote Post by Yomber » Sun Jul 26, 2020 2:09 am The most recent version was the 2009 version, 11 years ago surely they can improve perfection? :P

[]: Re: Will we see a new version of Cruel Angel's Thesis?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Jul 26, 2020 9:44 am Probably not in the actual film but I wouldn’t be surprised if they made another remix whenever the movie gets released.

[]: Re: Will we see a new version of Cruel Angel's Thesis?             Quote Post by KurisuNimii » Sun Jul 26, 2020 6:58 pm Dude this is so crazy!!! in this morning i was thinking "if they put Cruel angel thesis song in the new movie??" and now... i see it here, i would love see it in the 3.0 + 1.0 <3 <3 <3 I'd be very very very happy <3 the fans would go crazy
